title: Tests, Examples, Fuzzing, Benchmarks, Coverage, and Static Analysis · Stakeholder Go Mission
summary: A platform engineering team. The team needs a documented reusable parser module with narrow APIs, typed errors, generic helpers, examples, changed cases, fuzz properties, and dependency evidence. Planned artifact: Deliver Versioned Validated Parser Library with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, return, wrap, join, inspect, and classify error values with errors.Is and errors.As while preserving causes.
Explain semantic import versioning, minimal version selection, module graphs, sums, proxies, and private-module boundaries.
Compare generics, interfaces, concrete functions, code generation, and reflection from relationship, performance, and API needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
